description: Single-digit adder — pipes two digits through a unary counter. Famously slow.

2003-cal-henderson.skip_reason: Cannot handle the full add program

2003-jeff-binder.skip_reason: Runs this program correctly under an interactive terminal — typing `2` then `3` at the prompts produces `? + 5` — but the harness's one-shot piped stdin closes before the slow unary counter finishes.
